item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla is down to the last few hundred Model S & X cars in inventory. Poignant end of an era.

item.title: @elonmusk: LIVE: They are coming home. Watch as the Artemis II crew returns to Earth, splashing down at around ...
item.description: LIVE: They are coming home. Watch as the Artemis II crew returns to Earth, splashing down at around 8:07pm ET (0007 UTC April 11).xcancel.com/i/broadcasts/1pKdRbMALвА¶

item.title: @elonmusk: There should be no вАЬcareer criminalsвАЭ. Crimes committed with 1 or more prior arrest: Murder: 66% Rap...
item.description: There should be no вАЬcareer criminalsвАЭ. Crimes committed with 1 or more prior arrest: Murder: 66% Rape: 66% Robbery: 70% Assault: 71% Burglary: 77% Theft: 70% Car Theft: 78% Fraud: 60% Drug Trafficking: 78% Weapons: 79% Etc You can incarcerate your way out of crimeвА¶ Facts.

item.title: @elonmusk: After a journey of more than 690,000 miles, the crew is nearly home. The Artemis II crew will splash...
item.description: After a journey of more than 690,000 miles, the crew is nearly home. The Artemis II crew will splash down off the coast of San Diego later today and, though it wonвАЩt be visible from land, you can still wave in their general direction to welcome them back to Earth! рЯСЛ

item.title: @elonmusk: The Irish government have announced they're sending in the "Defence Forces" to remove farmers and lo...
item.description: The Irish government have announced they're sending in the "Defence Forces" to remove farmers and lorry drivers protesting across the country. They can bring in the army to remove struggling workers yet not defend borders? High treason!

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 hitting 83% on non-hallucination. Values truth. Claude ~74%. Others sitting in the 60sвА¶ or...
item.description: Grok 4.20 hitting 83% on non-hallucination. Values truth. Claude ~74%. Others sitting in the 60sвА¶ or way lower. Less guessing. More honesty when it doesnвАЩt know. ThatвАЩs a different kind of intelligence.@xAI@Grok@XFreeze

item.description: Grok can be quite funny рЯШВgrok.com/share/bGVnYWN5_1f34вА¶

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: The Australian government chose to arrest Ben Roberts-Smith in Sydney rather than his home...
item.description: BREAKING: The Australian government chose to arrest Ben Roberts-Smith in Sydney rather than his home state of Queensland because the government prosecution wanted less white Australians on the jury - вАЬa more diverse jury pool.вАЭ So in practice the Australian government want Hamas and Hezbollah supporters from Lakemba and West Sydney to sit and judge AustraliaвАЩs most decorated veteran from the Afghan War. This explains why the Australian government rejected Ben Roberts-SmithвАЩs repeated offers over multiple years to peacefully hand himself in. Instead they chose to arrest him on a plane in Sydney in front of his children and the wider public - a calculated humiliation ritual. Sydney Morning Herald: вАЬOne well-placed source suggested investigators might have waited to arrest Roberts-Smith in NSW because they wanted access to a wider and more diverse jury poolвАЭ than more conservative Queensland, where he lives.

item.title: @elonmusk: What if Charlie Kirk had been a beloved figure on the left, rather than among conservatives? And wha...
item.description: What if Charlie Kirk had been a beloved figure on the left, rather than among conservatives? And what if Sharon McMahon were a conservativeвАФone who had defamed Charlie Kirk immediately after his horrific assassination at UVU? Would UVU have scheduled her to speak at commencement? Not in a million years. Not in ten million years. So why does UVU think this is okay? ItвАЩs not.

item.title: @elonmusk: And splashdown! America is back in the business of sending astronauts to the Moon and bringing them ...
item.description: And splashdown! America is back in the business of sending astronauts to the Moon and bringing them home safely. Reid, Victor, Christina, and Jeremy did an outstanding job. These talented astronauts inspired the world and represented their space agencies and nations as humanityвАЩs ambassadors to the stars. This was a test mission, the first crewed flight of SLS and Orion, pushing farther into the unforgiving environment of space than ever before, and it carried real risk. They accepted that risk for all we stood to learn and for the exciting missions that follow, as we return to the lunar surface, build a Moon base, and prepare for what comes next. And they were not alone. The entire NASA workforce, our commercial and international partners, and the hopes and dreams of people all over the world were with them. The astronauts know it, and you should too. This mission would not have been possible without you. Congratulations. Artemis II, mission accomplished.

item.title: @elonmusk: EPIC BACKFIRE IN IRELAND The Irish Government sent in the MILITARY to CRUSH fuel protestersвА¶but the ...
item.description: EPIC BACKFIRE IN IRELAND The Irish Government sent in the MILITARY to CRUSH fuel protestersвА¶but the Crowds EXPLODED in size. Now, huge parts of the country are RUNNING OUT OF FUEL. Their Globalist Regime has COMPLETELY LOST CONTROL

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1....
item.description: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1.5T - 6T - 10T Some catching up to do.
